raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/src/main/java/de.general_idea: Update Java array declaration syntax from legacy C-style to standard Java style.
Replace deprecated SpringApplicationBuilder usage with the standard SpringApplication.run entry point.
Add an informational log message when the mock reader thread starts to improve observability.
Add an informational log message when a new sensor message is published to track data flow.
raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/src/main/java/de.human_impl: LOGGER.info("MOCK READER publishing new temperature messsage -> {}", message.toString());

raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/src/main/java/de.general_idea: Mark the instance field as final to enforce immutability and ensure it is initialized in the constructor.
Add an info-level log message when the BMP085 reading thread starts to improve observability.
Add an info-level log message when a new temperature/pressure message is published to track data flow.
Replace the legacy fixed-size thread pool executor with a virtual thread-per-task executor to leverage Java 21's structured concurrency features.
Comment out the Bmp085DataEventPublisher bean definition, likely because it is no longer needed or handled differently in the new version.

raspberrypi-boot-server/src/main/java/de.general_idea: Replace deprecated AbstractWebSocketMessageBrokerConfigurer with the WebSocketMessageBrokerConfigurer interface to align with modern Spring Boot practices.
raspberrypi-boot-server/src/main/java/de.human_impl: public class WebSocketConfig implements WebSocketMessageBrokerConfigurer, EnvironmentAware

raspberrypi-boot-server/src/main/java/de.general_idea: Update addEndpoint call to accept a String instead of a String array, reflecting API signature changes or simplifications.
Wrap configuration property retrievals with Objects.requireNonNull to enforce non-null values, likely addressing stricter null-handling expectations in newer JDKs or Spring versions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Increment the project version from 1.2.0-SNAPSHOT to 1.3.0-SNAPSHOT to reflect the new development cycle.

Update the project's target Java version property from 17 to 21.
Upgrade Jackson Databind dependency from 2.12.5 to 2.15.3 for compatibility and security fixes.
